---
name: anthill feedback
about: An idea, rough edge, or bug about anthill itself — ideas are as welcome as bugs
title: "[feedback/friction]  "
labels: anthill-feedback
---

<!--
This is the home for feedback about anthill itself — not your own team's work.
Ideas and rough edges are as welcome as bugs: if using anthill sparked a "what if
it did X", that belongs here just as much as "X broke".

Most of the time this issue is filed for you by `anthill feedback "<message>"
--submit`, which fills in the title, body, and label. This template is for filing
by hand.
-->

## What

<!-- The idea, the rough edge, or what went wrong. One or two sentences is fine. -->

## Why / what you expected

<!-- Why it matters, or what you expected to happen instead. -->

## Which category

<!-- Pick the closest — and edit the `[feedback/<category>]` in the title to match:
  - idea      — a suggestion or "what if it did X"
  - friction  — a rough edge that slowed you down (the default)
  - bug       — something is broken or behaves wrong
  - docs      — the instructions were unclear or misled you
-->

friction
